query: SELECT bw.id, bw.challenge_id, bw.user_id, p.displayName AS participant_name, bw.day, bw.boost_id, bw.boost_name, bw.points_awarded, bw.awarded_at, LEFT(COALESCE(bw.warden_note, ''), 180) AS note_preview FROM boost_wins bw LEFT JOIN participants p ON p.id = bw.user_id ORDER BY bw.day DESC, bw.boost_id ASC, bw.user_id ASC, bw.awarded_at ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT bw.id, bw.challenge_id, bw.user_id, p.displayName AS participant_name, bw.day, bw.boost_id, bw.boost_name, bw.points_awarded, bw.awarded_at, LEFT(COALESCE(bw.warden_note, ''), 180) AS note_preview FROM boost_wins bw LEFT JOIN participants p ON p.id = bw.user_id ORDER BY bw.day DESC, bw.boost_id ASC, bw.user_id ASC, bw.awarded_at ASC;

rows.note_preview: EARLY BIRD: first valid pass before 08:00.
EARLY BIRD: first valid pass before 08:00.
GHOST HUNTER: best day from the no-Ghost-Life bracket.

MOVER: biggest seven-day rank climb outside the top three.
FIRST UP: first passing log through the gate without a consecutive-day repeat.
HARDEST DAY: 60 minutes logged for the hardest verified training day.
STREAK KING: Nay owns the longest non-leader streak.
